title: FinalPiece
body:
## 🌸Shortly
This is a mod that adds content (devil fruits, entities, structures, weapons) from the One Piece anime to Minecraft.
## ✅ Main features:
- Custom leveling system: You can access the mod's main menu with a key binding (default: R) and gain different amounts of XP depending on the strength of the mob you kill. For each level, you receive 3 skill points which you can allocate to health, devil fruit abilities, melee attacks, or Haki level.
- Custom combat system: You can enter combat mode with another key binding (default: Left Alt) and use different abilities by pressing different keys. The abilities screen is located in the mod's main menu. 
- Devil fruits: If you eat a devil fruit, you will gain new magical abilities. To obtain a devil fruit, you must find a box inside a custom structure and open it. There are five rarities of devil fruits - 1-5 stars - and each has a different chance of dropping from a box. If you eat a second devil fruit, you will die!
- Haki: When you first join the game, you will receive the "Busoshoku Haki" ability. This ability will increase your Haki level by adding it to your original ability level.
- Mob abilities: All abilities are designed to be usable by any living creature. Marine captains have a 25% chance of spawning with a 2 or 3-star fruit. If a desired fruit is not available, you can use a command to give them a fruit of your choice.
## 🍏 Current state:
- 11 fruits
- 60 abilities in total
- 6 new mobs
- 4 new structures with custom loot
## ⌚️ Future plans:
- More devil fruits will be added.
- Each devil fruit will have its own owner mob.
- Structures based on famous anime locations will be added.
- An alternative method for obtaining Haki will be implemented.
## 📕Modpacks:
You can freely use this mod in your modpack. Nothing is required.

This mod adds a lot of keybindings and destructive abilities, so it is recommended to make it the main mod in a modpack.
